no: Adds 50+ consumable items: elixirs, potions, weapon oils, remedies, and throwables. Inspired by BG3, NWN, and The Witcher. Supersedes ZS_WeaponOils

conflicts.reason: ZS_Consumables supersedes ZS_WeaponOils. The oils component is taken directly from the deprecated mod. Use one or the other

sum: Adds 50+ consumable items inspired by BG3, NWN, and The Witcher: elixirs, potions, weapon oils, remedies, and throwables.

co.tp2n: Install consumables and spread them all through the world
co.no: 50+ consumable items distributed to stores and NPCs. Elixirs are powerful but only one active at a time. Oils coat weapons for 1 turn
